title: Nyf's Compat
description: Adds compat to mods I find in modpacks that do not have compat but should.
body:
Nyf's Compat aims to add Configurable compatibility between mods as well as some QOL improvements.

Current Compat:

- Allows Drinking from Travelers Backpacks to work with Survive Mods Thirst System (only purified water and minecraft water working atm)
- Jade x Serene Seasons compat, so you can see Calendar Season Data in the Item Frame.
- Iron Spellbooks OP modpack Compat: Allows for a better scaling of Spell Damage for modpacks that beef up the power in the world.
